findings: child-agents.jsonl never parsed, only appended — malformed lines have zero blast radius
swarm-state.json reads wrapped in try/except with fallback — truncation degrades one commander display only
No pre-read content validation — existence checks only
No retry/recovery for corrupt ledgers — by design (append-only, never rewrite policy)
Blast radius isolated: one malformed file affects one agent or one stat, never the full run
Zero observability into corruption — silent degradation with no warnings surfaced to users
